eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 2:50 PM on JUL 9, 2026 Effective until 2:50 PM JUL 10, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Yavapai Sheriff Alert: 07/09/2026
There is a wildfire near Rolling Ridge & Marble Canyon Way, Cordes Lakes SET Status for YCU-2333 Gather essential supplies. Prepare in case of evacuation. https://go.genasys.com/bj1xt4
